SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: cmd.exe /c mkdir C:\Logs 2>nul & if exist C:\Install\virtio-win-guest-tools.exe (C:\Install\virtio-win-guest-tools.exe /quiet /norestart > C:\Logs\virtio-guest-tools.log 2>&1) else (echo virtio-win-guest-tools.exe not found > C:\Logs\virtio-guest-tools-missing.log)

SynchronousCommand.Description: Install QEMU Guest Agent MSI fallback
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: cmd.exe /c if exist C:\Install\qemu-ga-x86_64.msi msiexec.exe /i C:\Install\qemu-ga-x86_64.msi /qn /norestart /L*v C:\Logs\qemu-ga-install.log

SynchronousCommand.Description: Enable and start QEMU Guest Agent
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: cmd.exe /c sc config QEMU-GA start= auto & net start QEMU-GA > C:\Logs\qemu-ga-start.log 2>&1

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip6\Parameters' -Name 'DisabledComponents' -PropertyType DWord -Value 255 -Force; Get-NetAdapterBinding -ComponentID ms_tcpip6 | Disable-NetAdapterBinding -ComponentID ms_tcpip6"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Create post reboot setup script and task

SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: cmd.exe /c shutdown /r /t 10 /c "First reboot after automated Windows Server setup"
